use_cases: Displaying traffic analytics comparing mobile vs desktop usage over time periods
Showing growth metrics and peak values for performance tracking
Enabling period comparison (7 days, 30 days, 3 months) for trend analysis
Interactive chart with hover tooltips showing point details
Dashboard analytics visualization for SaaS and business intelligence tools
ai_summary: A clean wireframe-style line graph analytics component displaying mobile and desktop usage statistics over customizable time periods. Features smooth curved line charts with gradient area fills, interactive hover tooltips showing point values, period selector tabs, and animated chart rendering. Includes key metrics display showing peak values, averages, and growth percentages with professional typography.
